title: Black Jack Chews 500g Sweet Pouch
features: Our Fruity, Jelly & Gummy Sweets are all part of our huge Pick and Mix range!
Manufactured in the UK and filled in our Sweet Shop, each sweet is sealed to maintain freshness to your door!
We have a huge range of traditional sweets, old fashioned sweets, retro sweets and pick and mix sweet boxes, sweet jars and other sweet gifts for you to enjoy or give as a gift.
description: These Black Jacks are nostalgic sweets made with a natural, distinctive aniseed flavour and they’re famous for turning your tongue black! Ingredients For allergens please see ingredients listed in bold. Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Water, Palm Oil, Colour (Vegetable Carbon), Beef Gelatine, Acid (Citric Acid), Emulsifier ( Soya Lecithin), Aniseed Oil, Spirulina Concentrate.
